faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: How does the online coin flip work?
faq.a1: FlipTheCoin.app simulates a real physics engine. The coin is launched with randomised force and spin, then falls under gravity until it settles on heads or tails — just like a real coin toss, not a simple random number.
faq.q2: Is this coin flip truly random?
faq.a2: Yes. Our simulation combines real 3D physics with a seeded random number generator, making each flip non-deterministic and tamper-proof. It cannot be rigged to land a specific way.
faq.q3: Can I use this instead of a real coin?
faq.a3: Absolutely. Whether you need to settle a bet, make a quick decision, pick sides before a game, or run a classroom exercise — FlipTheCoin.app is a fair, accepted substitute for a physical coin flip.
faq.a4: Completely free, forever. No account required, no ads, no tracking. Open and accessible from any browser on any device.
